(Replace_me)Searching...
Error
Do you want to replace {0} with {1}?
Ability {0} of the same type has already been applied. Do you want to replace it with {1}?
I'm your sergeant. This is first legionary training.
LET'S GO!
SKIP
TEST
error_BrawlerCannotFindEnemy
error_BrawlerFightMissed
error_BrawlerInvalidEnemy
error_BrawlerAlreadyStarted
error_BrawlerInvalidTotalRounds
error_InvalidDisplayName
I wanted to believe the Legion’s very heart to be the last place for them to look for us. But I was wrong. We’re being watched... that’s a spy, go get him!
Served him right... When he awakens, it will all seem like a bad dream for him.
Heck, we were too relaxed and forgot the danger. Got to be much more cautious, or else trouble won’t be long for coming.
Look at the Scouts to see how dangerous Shadow Energy is. Their squad has led our way here. But dealing with a power like that always leaves its mark.
They say the Scouts are burying something at the Gorge. They finally have cracked their brain—the same expects your squad, so it’s your case to solve. Go!
The Scouts fell on you like wild beasts, didn’t they? Do you want to end up like that, too? Your Sarge must be blind not to see the menace.
Shadow Energy has made the Scouts faster and angrier. At the beginning of our great way—who could’ve expected it to come to this?
Sarge is building more Shadow squads. But I am sure the Liquidators, who are coming soon, will solve all our problems.
Compared to them you’re a crip. They’re called in only on rare days of trouble, and build their might absorbing Shadow Energy. Whoever stands in their way dies.
Training for Liquidator is demanding—few can complete it. But I’ll show you some of it: it’ good for the youth to know that the Legion’s really capable of.
Not bad. I didn’t think you’d manage. The Liquidators often fight Shadow emanations—something your kind isn’t trained for. A huge omission, if you ask me.
Expectedly, the Liquidators rarely lose. But there’s a drawback to their situation, too: the bargain with Shadow dooms them to loneliness, even among their own.
FEEDBACK
Describe any problems you had:
UI is hard to interact
Poor performance
Game crashes
Don't know what to do next
Game is too hard
Additional thoughts, problems and suggestions:
LATER
SEND
SYSTEM MESSAGE

This is the end of the Chapter I main quest, but you can still play side missions if you want.
Stay tuned for the release date!

BASHER
A [FDBE11]8% chance[-] to stun your enemy for [FDBE11]3 seconds[-] with a hit
A [FDBE11]9% chance[-] to stun your enemy for [FDBE11]3 seconds[-] with a hit
A [FDBE11]10% chance[-] to stun your enemy for [FDBE11]3 seconds[-] with a hit
A [FDBE11]11% chance[-] to stun your enemy for [FDBE11]3 seconds[-] with a hit
A [FDBE11]12% chance[-] to stun your enemy for [FDBE11]5 seconds[-] with a hit
BREACHER
A [FDBE11]10% chance[-] to deal full damage through enemy block
A [FDBE11]12% chance[-] to deal full damage through enemy block
A [FDBE11]15% chance[-] to deal full damage through enemy block
A [FDBE11]17% chance[-] to deal full damage through enemy block
A [FDBE11]20% chance[-] to deal full damage through enemy block
BERSERK
A [FDBE11]15% chance[-] to deal [FDBE11]+10% damage[-] with a hit, losing [FDBE11]30%[-] of additional damage from your health
A [FDBE11]15% chance[-] to deal [FDBE11]+20% damage[-] with a hit, losing [FDBE11]30%[-] of additional damage from your health
A [FDBE11]20% chance[-] to deal [FDBE11]+20% damage[-] with a hit, losing [FDBE11]20%[-] of additional damage from your health

A [FDBE11]30% chance[-] to deal [FDBE11]+30% damage[-] with a hit, losing [FDBE11]10%[-] of additional damage from your health
IRON GRIP
A [FDBE11]25% chance[-] to withstand Shock without dropping your weapon
A [FDBE11]35% chance[-] to withstand Shock without dropping your weapon
A [FDBE11]50% chance[-] to withstand Shock without dropping your weapon
A [FDBE11]75% chance[-] to withstand Shock without dropping your weapon
A [FDBE11]100% chance[-] to withstand Shock without dropping your weapon
STEEL FOOT
A [FDBE11]15% chance[-] to knock off your enemy to the ground with a kick
A [FDBE11]16% chance[-] to knock off your enemy to the ground with a kick
A [FDBE11]17% chance[-] to knock off your enemy to the ground with a kick
A [FDBE11]18% chance[-] to knock off your enemy to the ground with a kick
A [FDBE11]20% chance[-] to knock off your enemy to the ground with a kick
ROCK
A [FDBE11]15% chance[-] to withstand a Critical hit without falling, reducing its damage by [FDBE11]10%[-]
A [FDBE11]17% chance[-] to withstand a Critical hit without falling, reducing its damage by [FDBE11]20%[-]
A [FDBE11]20% chance[-] to withstand a Critical hit without falling, reducing its damage by [FDBE11]20%[-]
A [FDBE11]25% chance[-] to withstand a Critical hit without falling, reducing its damage by [FDBE11]30%[-]
A [FDBE11]30% chance[-] to withstand a Critical hit without falling, reducing its damage by [FDBE11]30%[-]
STONE SKIN
A [FDBE11]10% chance[-] to reduce incoming damage to [FDBE11]20%[-] of your health
A [FDBE11]12% chance[-] to reduce incoming damage to [FDBE11]20%[-] of your health
A [FDBE11]15% chance[-] to reduce incoming damage to [FDBE11]15%[-] of your health
A [FDBE11]17% chance[-] to reduce incoming damage to [FDBE11]15%[-] of your health
A [FDBE11]20% chance[-] to reduce incoming damage to [FDBE11]10%[-] of your health
REVENGE
A [FDBE11]20% chance[-] to get [FDBE11]+10% damage[-] for [FDBE11]5 seconds[-] after receiving a Critical hit
A [FDBE11]25% chance[-] to get [FDBE11]+12% damage[-] for [FDBE11]5 seconds[-] after receiving a Critical hit
A [FDBE11]30% chance[-] to get [FDBE11]+15% damage[-] for [FDBE11]5 seconds[-] after receiving a Critical hit
A [FDBE11]35% chance[-] to get [FDBE11]+17% damage[-] for [FDBE11]5 seconds[-] after receiving a Critical hit
A [FDBE11]40% chance[-] to get [FDBE11]+20% damage[-] for [FDBE11]5 seconds[-] after receiving a Critical hit
REPELLER
A [FDBE11]20% chance[-] to get [FDBE11]+10% damage[-] for [FDBE11]3 seconds[-] after a successful block
A [FDBE11]25% chance[-] to get [FDBE11]+12% damage[-] for [FDBE11]3 seconds[-] after a successful block
A [FDBE11]30% chance[-] to get [FDBE11]+15% damage[-] for [FDBE11]3 seconds[-] after a successful block
A [FDBE11]35% chance[-] to get [FDBE11]+17% damage[-] for [FDBE11]3 seconds[-] after a successful block
A [FDBE11]40% chance[-] to get [FDBE11]+20% damage[-] for [FDBE11]3 seconds[-] after a successful block
PREDATOR
Gain [FDBE11]+10% damage[-] if your enemy's health is under [FDBE11]20%[-]
Gain [FDBE11]+12% damage[-] if your enemy's health is under [FDBE11]25%[-]
Gain [FDBE11]+15% damage[-] if your enemy's health is under [FDBE11]30%[-]
Gain [FDBE11]+17% damage[-] if your enemy's health is under [FDBE11]35%[-]
Gain [FDBE11]+20% damage[-] if your enemy's health is under [FDBE11]40%[-]
RETRIBUTION
Gain [FDBE11]+10% damage[-] until the end of Round after receiving a Shock
Gain [FDBE11]+15% damage[-] until the end of Round after receiving a Shock
Gain [FDBE11]+20% damage[-] until the end of Round after receiving a Shock
Gain [FDBE11]+25% damage[-] until the end of Round after receiving a Shock
Gain [FDBE11]+30% damage[-] until the end of Round after receiving a Shock
RECOLLECTION
A [FDBE11]30% chance[-] to get [FDBE11]+25% Shadow Energy[-] after receiving a Head hit
A [FDBE11]30% chance[-] to get [FDBE11]+27% Shadow Energy[-] after receiving a Head hit
A [FDBE11]30% chance[-] to get [FDBE11]+30% Shadow Energy[-] after receiving a Head hit
A [FDBE11]30% chance[-] to get [FDBE11]+32% Shadow Energy[-] after receiving a Head hit
A [FDBE11]30% chance[-] to get [FDBE11]+35% Shadow Energy[-] after receiving a Head hit
LIFESTEAL
A [FDBE11]10% chance[-] to gain [FDBE11]30%[-] of your attack damage as health
A [FDBE11]13% chance[-] to gain [FDBE11]35%[-] of your attack damage as health
A [FDBE11]15% chance[-] to gain [FDBE11]40%[-] of your attack damage as health
A [FDBE11]18% chance[-] to gain [FDBE11]45%[-] of your attack damage as health
A [FDBE11]20% chance[-] to gain [FDBE11]50%[-] of your attack damage as health
BLEEDING
A [FDBE11]10% chance[-] to cause your enemy to lose health equal to [FDBE11]30%[-] of your attack damage over [FDBE11]3 seconds[-]
A [FDBE11]13% chance[-] to cause your enemy to lose health equal to [FDBE11]35%[-] of your attack damage over [FDBE11]3 seconds[-]
A [FDBE11]15% chance[-] to cause your enemy to lose health equal to [FDBE11]40%[-] of your attack damage over [FDBE11]3 seconds[-]
A [FDBE11]18% chance[-] to cause your enemy to lose health equal to [FDBE11]45%[-] of your attack damage over [FDBE11]3 seconds[-]
A [FDBE11]20% chance[-] to cause your enemy to lose health equal to [FDBE11]50%[-] of your attack damage over [FDBE11]3 seconds[-]
SHADOW BURN
A [FDBE11]30% chance[-] to cause your enemy to lose health and Shadow Energy equal to [FDBE11]50%[-] of your attack damage
A [FDBE11]30% chance[-] to cause your enemy to lose health and Shadow Energy equal to [FDBE11]63%[-] of your attack damage
A [FDBE11]30% chance[-] to cause your enemy to lose health and Shadow Energy equal to [FDBE11]75%[-] of your attack damage
A [FDBE11]30% chance[-] to cause your enemy to lose health and Shadow Energy equal to [FDBE11]88%[-] of your attack damage
A [FDBE11]30% chance[-] to cause your enemy to lose health and Shadow Energy equal to [FDBE11]100%[-] of your attack damage
SHADOW DRAIN
A [FDBE11]30% chance[-] to gain [FDBE11]50%[-] of your attack damage as additional Shadow Energy
A [FDBE11]35% chance[-] to gain [FDBE11]63%[-] of your attack damage as additional Shadow Energy
A [FDBE11]40% chance[-] to gain [FDBE11]75%[-] of your attack damage as additional Shadow Energy
A [FDBE11]45% chance[-] to gain [FDBE11]88%[-] of your attack damage as additional Shadow Energy
A [FDBE11]50% chance[-] to gain [FDBE11]100%[-] of your attack damage as additional Shadow Energy
SHIELDING (ARMOR)
A [FDBE11]10% chance[-] to increase your defence by [FDBE11]5%[-] for [FDBE11]2 seconds[-] after receiving a Body hit
A [FDBE11]13% chance[-] to increase your defence by [FDBE11]10%[-] for [FDBE11]2 seconds[-] after receiving a Body hit
A [FDBE11]15% chance[-] to increase your defence by [FDBE11]15%[-] for [FDBE11]2 seconds[-] after receiving a Body hit
A [FDBE11]18% chance[-] to increase your defence by [FDBE11]20%[-] for [FDBE11]2 seconds[-] after receiving a Body hit
A [FDBE11]20% chance[-] to increase your defence by [FDBE11]25%[-] for [FDBE11]2 seconds[-] after receiving a Body hit
SHIELDING (HELM)
A [FDBE11]10% chance[-] to increase your defence by [FDBE11]5%[-] for [FDBE11]2 seconds[-] after receiving a Head hit
A [FDBE11]13% chance[-] to increase your defence by [FDBE11]10%[-] for [FDBE11]2 seconds[-] after receiving a Head hit
A [FDBE11]15% chance[-] to increase your defence by [FDBE11]15%[-] for [FDBE11]2 seconds[-] after receiving a Head hit
A [FDBE11]18% chance[-] to increase your defence by [FDBE11]20%[-] for [FDBE11]2 seconds[-] after receiving a Head hit
A [FDBE11]20% chance[-] to increase your defence by [FDBE11]25%[-] for [FDBE11]2 seconds[-] after receiving a Head hit
ELECTRO SHOCK (ARMOR)
A [FDBE11]10% chance[-] to reduce your enemy's defence by [FDBE11]5%[-] for [FDBE11]2 seconds[-] after receiving a Body hit
A [FDBE11]13% chance[-] to reduce your enemy's defence by [FDBE11]10%[-] for [FDBE11]2 seconds[-] after receiving a Body hit
A [FDBE11]15% chance[-] to reduce your enemy's defence by [FDBE11]15%[-] for [FDBE11]2 seconds[-] after receiving a Body hit
A [FDBE11]18% chance[-] to reduce your enemy's defence by [FDBE11]20%[-] for [FDBE11]2 seconds[-] after receiving a Body hit
A [FDBE11]20% chance[-] to reduce your enemy's defence by [FDBE11]25%[-] for [FDBE11]2 seconds[-] after receiving a Body hit
ELECTRO SHOCK (HELM)
A [FDBE11]10% chance[-] to reduce your enemy's defence by [FDBE11]5%[-] for [FDBE11]2 seconds[-] after receiving a Head hit
A [FDBE11]13% chance[-] to reduce your enemy's defence by [FDBE11]10%[-] for [FDBE11]2 seconds[-] after receiving a Head hit
A [FDBE11]15% chance[-] to reduce your enemy's defence by [FDBE11]15%[-] for [FDBE11]2 seconds[-] after receiving a Head hit
A [FDBE11]18% chance[-] to reduce your enemy's defence by [FDBE11]20%[-] for [FDBE11]2 seconds[-] after receiving a Head hit
A [FDBE11]20% chance[-] to reduce your enemy's defence by [FDBE11]25%[-] for [FDBE11]2 seconds[-] after receiving a Head hit
DAMAGE RETURN (ARMOR)
A [FDBE11]20% chance[-] to deal [FDBE11]20%[-] of incoming hit damage to your enemy
A [FDBE11]25% chance[-] to deal [FDBE11]25%[-] of incoming hit damage to your enemy
A [FDBE11]30% chance[-] to deal [FDBE11]30%[-] of incoming hit damage to your enemy
A [FDBE11]35% chance[-] to deal [FDBE11]35%[-] of incoming hit damage to your enemy
A [FDBE11]40% chance[-] to deal [FDBE11]40%[-] of incoming hit damage to your enemy
DAMAGE RETURN (HELM)
A [FDBE11]20% chance[-] to deal [FDBE11]20%[-] of incoming hit damage to your enemy
A [FDBE11]25% chance[-] to deal [FDBE11]25%[-] of incoming hit damage to your enemy
A [FDBE11]30% chance[-] to deal [FDBE11]30%[-] of incoming hit damage to your enemy
A [FDBE11]35% chance[-] to deal [FDBE11]35%[-] of incoming hit damage to your enemy
A [FDBE11]40% chance[-] to deal [FDBE11]40%[-] of incoming hit damage to your enemy
DAMAGE ABSORPTION (ARMOR)
A [FDBE11]20% chance[-] to reduce incoming hit damage by [FDBE11]20%[-]
A [FDBE11]25% chance[-] to reduce incoming hit damage by [FDBE11]25%[-]
A [FDBE11]30% chance[-] to reduce incoming hit damage by [FDBE11]30%[-]
A [FDBE11]35% chance[-] to reduce incoming hit damage by [FDBE11]35%[-]
A [FDBE11]40% chance[-] to reduce incoming hit damage by [FDBE11]40%[-]
DAMAGE ABSORPTION (HELM)
A [FDBE11]20% chance[-] to reduce incoming hit damage by [FDBE11]20%[-]
A [FDBE11]25% chance[-] to reduce incoming hit damage by [FDBE11]25%[-]
A [FDBE11]30% chance[-] to reduce incoming hit damage by [FDBE11]30%[-]
A [FDBE11]35% chance[-] to reduce incoming hit damage by [FDBE11]35%[-]
A [FDBE11]40% chance[-] to reduce incoming hit damage by [FDBE11]40%[-]
REGENERATION (ARMOR)
A [FDBE11]20% chance[-] to replenish [FDBE11]20%[-] of incoming hit damage as health over [FDBE11]1.5 seconds[-]
A [FDBE11]25% chance[-] to replenish [FDBE11]25%[-] of incoming hit damage as health over [FDBE11]1.5 seconds[-]
A [FDBE11]30% chance[-] to replenish [FDBE11]30%[-] of incoming hit damage as health over [FDBE11]1.5 seconds[-]
A [FDBE11]35% chance[-] to replenish [FDBE11]35%[-] of incoming hit damage as health over [FDBE11]1.5 seconds[-]
A [FDBE11]40% chance[-] to replenish [FDBE11]40%[-] of incoming hit damage as health over [FDBE11]1.5 seconds[-]
REGENERATION (HELM)
A [FDBE11]20% chance[-] to replenish [FDBE11]20%[-] of incoming hit damage as health over [FDBE11]1.5 seconds[-]
A [FDBE11]25% chance[-] to replenish [FDBE11]25%[-] of incoming hit damage as health over [FDBE11]1.5 seconds[-]
A [FDBE11]30% chance[-] to replenish [FDBE11]30%[-] of incoming hit damage as health over [FDBE11]1.5 seconds[-]
A [FDBE11]35% chance[-] to replenish [FDBE11]35%[-] of incoming hit damage as health over [FDBE11]1.5 seconds[-]
A [FDBE11]40% chance[-] to replenish [FDBE11]40%[-] of incoming hit damage as health over [FDBE11]1.5 seconds[-]
My name is Otto Hyme. I am the <color="#FDBE11">Sergeant</color> of the <color="#FDBE11">Shadow Squad</color>. You'll call me Sarge and do all that I tell you.
Ready to fight? My <color="#FDBE11">name is Gizmo</color>, and I'm here to <color="#FDBE11">test you</color>.
Gizmo is <color="#FDBE11">blocking</color> your hits! Try <color="#FDBE11">throwing</color> him to breach his defense.
Gizmo can train day and night! And you <color="#FDBE11">don't move</color> and block my hits.
All right, let's fight for real!
You learn fast. Let's see what else you can use in battle. <color="#FDBE11">Equip</color> your gear.
Excellent. Gizmo is already waiting for you.
Perhaps I can make you a good fighter. And now we're going to the <color="#FDBE11">store</color>.
People don't trust the <color="#FDBE11">Shadow Squad</color>, but until reinforcements arrive, there are not enough soldiers in the camp. So we have <color="#FDBE11">our first task</color> already.
We must punish the arrogant people from the <color="#FDBE11">Bamboo Fort</color>. They carry the flags of our enemies, the <color="#FDBE11">Dynasty</color>.
Enough! Enough! Go look for something else to do... Because I need to rest a little. Oh.
AVALANCHE
BARR
BIGHORN
BIRCH
BLACKEYE
BORDER PATROL
BOULDER
CULTIST
DEFECTOR
DELINQUENT
OUTCAST
INTERLOPER

EMMA
FORT COMMANDER
FULBARD
GALEN
GIZMO
GRETA
TRESPASSER
GRETA'S SOLDIER

HAMMERHEAD
HELGA
HENCHMAN
HERBALIST
HUGO
INVADER

IRONHAND
IVE
JUNE
LEGIONARY
LEGION SCOUT
LOOTER
MAUL
MYRON
MYSTERIOUS OPPONENT
OAK
OSBERT
DYNASTY SOLDIER
PARTISAN LEADER
RAM
RAN DI
RASCAL
REBEL
ROBBER

SARGE
SARGE'S ALLY
SCAR
SHADOW SOLDIER

GRETA'S GUARD
OPEN YOUR <color="#FDBE11">INVENTORY</color>
NOW CHECK YOUR <color="#FDBE11">WEAPON</color> TAB
<color="#FDBE11">TRY ON</color> SELECTED HELMET
GO TO <color="#FDBE11">STORE</color>
PRESS <color="#FDBE11">EQUIP</color> TO PUT ON YOUR ARMOR
<color="#FDBE11">EQUIP</color> YOUR SWORDS
EXCELLENT! <color="#FDBE11">PURCHASE</color> IT
PRESS <color="#FDBE11">MENU</color> BUTTON
PRESS <color="#FDBE11">TRAINING</color> BUTTON
GO TO <color="#FDBE11">MAP</color>
PRESS <color="#FDBE11">FIGHT</color> TO ENTER SELECTED BATTLE
PRESS <color="#FDBE11">BATTLE ICON</color> TO LEARN MORE ABOUT IT
YOU'VE ACQUIRED A SPECIAL ATTACK! PRESS <color="#FDBE11">ABILITIES</color> TO INSPECT IT
<color="#FDBE11">APPLY</color> ABILITY TO A SWORD
You can engage in sideline jobs occasionally. It is a good way of gaining both experience and a few extra coins.
The Bamboo Fort is a burr in the Legion’s saddle, constantly being reinforced with new fighters. The more of them you wipe off, the greater will be your wage.
<color="#FDBE11">MISSION</color> IS A PERIODICAL TYPE OF BATTLE THAT GRANTS BOTH <color="#FDBE11">COINS</color> AND <color="#FDBE11">EXPERIENCE</color>
<color="#FDBE11">SURVIVAL</color> IS A RECURRENT TYPE OF BATTLE WITH PROGRESSIVE <color="#FDBE11">COIN</color> REWARDS
CRUDE SWORD
NOBLE SWORD
BLOODLETTER'S BLADE
MOUNTAIN BLADE
NOONBLADE
LIGHT BRIM
PLAIN SWORDS
DOUBLE SKIVERS
ASH AND LIGHT
RIPPING KIT
PLAIN LONGSWORD
ORNATE TWO-HANDER
SILVER SQUALL
ARBITER
DOUBLE HATCHETS
RAMPAGE HATCHETS
LABRYSES
FURY BROTHERS
STEEL BUTTERFLIES
NIGHTBANES
RIFE HAMMER
SIGNETS OF WAR
WICKED TWINS
BONECRUSHERS
IRON LANCE
METAL STING
VULTURE'S CLAW
DESTINY'S EDGE
TRAINING UNIFORM
MOUNTAINEER'S DOUBLET
ROGUE'S DOUBLET
REINFORCED COAT
BEDROCK ARMOR
SCOUT'S JACKET
KAGUN'S WOOLFELL
SWAMPER'S CAMOUFLAGE
LAMINAR CUIRASS
WARLORD'S PLATES
LION'S PRIDE
LIQUIDATOR'S HARDSHELL
NOMAD'S CAP
MOUNTAINEER'S CAP
CAMPAIGNER'S HELM
VISORED CASQUE
BEDROCK HELM
SCOUT'S HAT
KAGUN'S HORNS
SWAMPER'S HEADGEAR
CUIRASSIER HELM
WARFACE
LION'S GAZE
LIQUIDATOR'S HEADPIECE
EASY
NORMAL
HARD
INSANE
IMPOSSIBLE
MAIN QUEST
MAIN QUEST
SIDE QUEST
SURVIVAL
MISSION
DAILY QUEST
BRAWLER
DIE EVEN HARDER
FIRST EXAM
NO REST ON LAURELS
GAME CHANGER
SARGES SECRET CACHE
FINAL RESOLUTION
SPILL THE BEANS
YOU WERE A SON TO ME
Neutralize the Bamboo Fort soldiers
Uphold Shadow Squad's honor in the tournament
Accept Sarge's heartiest congratulations
Show Ran Di your skills
Help June to find evidence against Sarge
End up with the bamboo fort
Pacify Gizmo
Accept Sarge's challenge
PRIVATE AFFAIR
SCOUT'S LAST TRIAL
TRAIN LIKE LIQUIDATOR
NEGOTIATIONS
Stop the trespasser
Find out what are the Scouts hiding in the Gorge
Endure the Liquidator's training
Save the negotiations
DIE EVEN HARDER
Conquer the Bamboo Fort
TRADE ROUTE
Protect the trade route
YOU OWE ME ONE
Help Gizmo repay his debts
THE LEGION'S JUSTICE
Punish the guilty Legionary
FULL CONTACT
Train the recruits
FRESH BLOOD
Learn foreign culture through a fight
MARAUDERS
Vindicate the honor of those fallen in the Gorge
NIGHTWATCH
Endure a nightwatch
HIT'N'COUNT
Play a game from Gizmo's childhood
BLACKOUTS
Win in spite of Shadow Energy's side effects
KEEP UNDER WRAPS
RECKLESS RECRUIT
ALL TOMORROW'S PARTIES
AWOL
RUNAWAY
GOOD REPUTATION
START WITH THE BASICS
FACE YOURSELF, FACE YOUR FEARS
KNOW YOUR ENEMY
FRACTURED
A GIFT FROM OLD FRIENDS
PRIDE AND PREJUDICE
BLAST FROM THE PAST
RIOT OUTTA NOWHERE
STARVING FOR A FIGHT
Help Sarge maintain secrecy
Beat Greta's spy
Whip men who feasted in the tent in your absence
Punish your careless fellow soldiers
Don't let people from Dynasty spread rumors about Legion
Don't let your drunk fellow soldiers get in trouble
Take your part in June's initial training
Fight June who's adopted all your Shadow skills
Complete Greta's training
Return a defector
Suppress the last resistance in Bamboo Fort
Investigate strange things in Gorge
Fight mysterious cultists
Suppress a riot
Resume food supplies
If <color="#FDBE11">Shadow Squad</color> fighters win this tournament, we’ll be made part of the Legion's regular army.
The Legion has <color="#FDBE11">lost at Falcon’s Gorge</color>. After that, I got a permission to use <color="#FDBE11">Shadow Energy</color>.
Great fighting! If we win the tournament, the <color="#FDBE11">Shadow Sphere</color> will be our goal.
The <color="#FDBE11">Shadow Sphere</color> is the reason of our defeat at Falcon’s Gorge. I only know that it is guarded by the <color="#FDBE11">Heralds</color>.
If we lose the tournament, I’ll leave the Legion, and the <color="#FDBE11">Shadow Squad</color> will be forgotten forever.
You have gone too far. I will not see your Shadow Squad become part of the Legion's ranks.
Greta, I respect you and your unit. We’re not each other’s enemies. I put the Legion first, just like you do.
How dare you compare yourself to me? I am not letting shadow pest anywhere near myself!
Perfect! Keep that grip tight, soldier. The <color="#FDBE11">tournament</color> is our chance to <color="#FDBE11">find the Sphere</color>. Don’t miss it.
You've reached the <color="#FDBE11">tournament finals</color>. The entire Shadow Squad is counting on you.
Otto, your Shadow Squad goes against all Legion principles! We do NOT utilize Shadow Energy!
Defeatist philosophy, Greta. Shadow Energy is our only way to <color="#FDBE11">conquering the Dynasty</color> - and then the <color="#FDBE11">Heralds</color>!
Defeatist?! You’re a disgrace to our whole army! Step aside, soldiers, <color="#FDBE11">I’ll fight this one myself</color>!
This was not to happen! Shadow Squad will not be part of the Legion!
It's happening already, Greta. My disciple just thrashed you. A new chapter in the Legion’s books is starting.
Keep trying if you want. I’ll be defending my army’s traditions to the last!
After your victory, <color="#FDBE11">we’re expanding</color> with many new volunteers. Gizmo will train the novices.
And I’m going to the Legion’s Council, so you’re staying on your own and can have some rest, champion.
Sarge and Gizmo gone? They <color="#FDBE11">didn't want us to meet</color> each other. But you're not going to be at their orders forever, are you?
This means that your victory at the tournament wasn't a coincidence, and you're the one I need.
Sound the alarm - there's a Dynasty infiltrator in the camp. Or shall you try defeating me all by yourself?
Well, I’ve seen better fighters. Look - has Sarge told you about the <color="#FDBE11">Sphere</color>? It has incredible power.
<color="#FDBE11">Sarge’s lying</color>. He wants to <color="#FDBE11">get hold of the Sphere</color> rather than destroy it. And only I know where it is.
First I must meet a friend. He’s now on his way back from talks with the Legion.
Hello, <color="#FDBE11">Ran Di</color>. Guess there’s no need to introduce my companion, for you usually know everyone already.
I must know for sure how good this fighter is. Must I watch out for that Squad? My man will try your friend.
Not bad. But one win proves nothing. Will your friend be bold enough to <color="#FDBE11">face me in a fight</color>?
Sarge has a <color="#FDBE11">hidden cache</color> at the Gorge. My men have learn that while I was at the talks. I’ll show you where.
Rumor stays rumor. Sarge is recruiting all kinds of loafers to his squad. This wasn’t worth my attention.
Sarge sends you? We want intel about the Legion’s disposition and <color="#FDBE11">our wage</color>. My men aren’t fighting for free.
The fool still believes it was Sarge who’s sent us. I wonder how much money does he make here.
Now <color="#FDBE11">we have proof</color> that Sarge was buying his Shadow Squad’s victories!
We must get back to the camp. I’ll wait in the tent while you bring the evidence to the Legion's top warlords.
We can leave, but that will cost Sarge extra.
You’ve done too much damage to be simply paid off.
Sarge sent you? Give me the usual. I need info about the Legion’s disposition and plans. And my fee, of course. My people aren’t fighting for free.
Do you believe me now? And this is not the only scheme Sarge has made. I have many more stories for you.
I knew that only a true Shadow monster like you could defeat those Bamboo half-wits, buddy!
I knew only a true Shadow monster like you here, cutie, could defeat those Bamboo half-wits!
Get lost, Gizmo! And tell Sarge we're not dancing to his tune any more.
Ya run away again, girlie? Weren't ya told to stay in the camp? All right, skirt, I'm taking ya back where ya belong.
Don't let Gizmo take me! They'll use you and then throw you away, just like they want to do with me now.
Ya gotta thank me for having trained ya so well! Anyway, soon enough that ain't gonna help ya. See ya at the camp!
You ain't gonna win against Gizmo the Great! Get ready for a painful welcome at the camp!
We're running out of time! He'll run off and inform Sarge any moment!
Gizmo and I came back and didn’t find you here. Where’ve you been, and who’s this girl next to you?
Who am I? Don't you know? Wasn’t it me who <color="#FDBE11">dragged you from the Gorge</color>, half-dead? Taught you <color="#FDBE11">all you know</color> now?
While Sarge's sorting things out with June, we can do the same. Been dreaming of beating you up for ages!
I can still fight! Sarge! Gimme a little time, and I won't spare this insolent bastard!
Calm down, Gizmo, you have lost. Which means I’ll deal with my disciple personally. Tomorrow at dawn.
Feel my might? Enjoy - you’re losing to the Legion's best, Gizmo the Great!
Why am I playing small with you?! I can tear you apart with my <color="#FDBE11">bare hands</color>!
Are you trusting this girl? She’s a Dynasty spy! Part of their plot against us!
We’ll fight the old way, <color="#FDBE11">no Shadow techniques</color>. Just brute strength.
Suckling! You could’ve died honorably at my hand. But now you have the whole Legion against you!
I have escaped! I <color="#FDBE11">gave all the evidence to Greta</color>. She’ll be glad to go at Sarge!
In exchange she gave me time to flee. The <color="#FDBE11">Sphere</color> is in the <color="#FDBE11">very heart of the Dynasty</color>. I’ll help you getting there.
Are you still breathing? We can continue later, for the custom demands fighting to the last breath.
You’re not leaving this arena alive! The <color="#FDBE11">Sphere shall be mine</color>! Then I won't need armies - I’ll be an army myself!
My sword, my heirloom! Someone want to steal it! Help me <color="#FDBE11">stopping the thief</color>!
Gizmo, I’m here for the sword that belongs to our family. And you are hiding behind an alien’s back.
You’re a disgrace to the family. Joining the <color="#FDBE11">Shadow Squad</color> was the last drop!
Ah, that was my sis <color="#FDBE11">Greta</color>. Don’t pay any attention to her - the Shadow Squad is disliked by all in the Legion.
I belong to an ancient Legionary lineage - unlike you. That is obvious, even from your poor fighting.
These are our allies, but as long as Legion men are nearby, we have to pretend we're catching them. Just hold for a while and try not to get a beating.
Good. The Legionaries have left, and now I'll just have to explain to our friends why were we fighting them.
On your feet, fighter. Or has our little show resulted in serious injuries?
The <color="#FDBE11">Scouts</color> find areas where Shadow Energy is present. Let’s go to the Gorge, they have a meeting there today.
The <color="#FDBE11">Scouts</color> are burying some armor in the depth of the Gorge. Suspicious. I think it’s time for us to step in!
That’s a Scout’s armor. The jacket is still wearable; everything else has been torn by a Shadow overload.
Them Scouts have become tough now. A while ago I used to kick them aside easily in sparring matches.
The cache is under one of the <color="#FDBE11">Shadow Rigs</color>. Of course: the Legionaries avoid them. Cover me, I'll find it.
Approaching the Shadow Rigs is dangerous! Leave the area now, before I have to resort to force!
You’ve <color="#FDBE11">defeated a Herald</color>! Only they can do such disappearing tricks. And I found what I was looking for.
That's a contract between Sarge and the people of the <color="#FDBE11">Bamboo Fort</color>. Looks like he’s made a <color="#FDBE11">dirty deal</color> with them!
Losing to a <color="#FDBE11">Herald</color> is not so much of a shame. Yes - it was one of them, the so-called allies of the Dynasty.
The <color="#FDBE11">Liquidators</color> are the Legion’s main weapon against <color="#FDBE11">Shadow Energy</color>. Our Squad must prove not being inferior.
I’ll show you how the <color="#FDBE11">Liquidators</color> train. Your adversary will keep the <color="#FDBE11">Shadow Form</color> throughout the whole round!
That was commendable! I used to dream of becoming a Liquidator myself – a while ago.
On your feet, soldier! A common Legionary won’t endure the Liquidators’ training - but you must be stronger!
The Bamboo Fort is free. <color="#FDBE11">Ran Di</color> will take part in negotiations on its further use.
Ran Di warned me of a possible act of <color="#FDBE11">sabotage</color>. You have to <color="#FDBE11">divert the plotters</color> to ensure calm at the talks.
Thanks for keeping them away. These people don't understand that their guerrilla warfare will bring no result.
Pick yourself up! The negotiations depend on you!
New soldiers come to the <color="#FDBE11">Bamboo Fort</color>. The more of them you can deal with, the higher will be your wage.
You cannot cope with a bunch of guerrillas, Sergeant? Fear not, my squad and I will help you.
Listen up, Shadow Squad! We’ve been fighting here for a long while; don’t let Greta take the glory!
The Legion camp is a <color="#FDBE11">former Dynasty village</color>. Capital dwellers send food to their kin there through the Gorge.
Some in the Legion help them. Not Sarge. <color="#FDBE11">He wants war</color>, and has people trying to cut the food supply line.
Sarge has many fighters now. We must protect this route as an evidence of friendship between our nations.
We have distracted them for a while. We’ll have to come back here later.
I <color="#FDBE11">owe the guys some money</color> and told them that you have it. Don’t you? Oh, you’re in trouble then...
I swear I knew you’d come out OK, that’s why I named you. And I was right, wasn’t I?
Well... looks like the guys just fancied fighting. They even didn’t want the money. A curious development...
Today you’ll be <color="#FDBE11">administering justice</color>. In the Legion, the strong survive, that’s why much is solved by a duel.
Good show! He's proven guilty and duly punished - all in one. Very well. That's Legion justice in action.
You weren’t playing at giveaway, were you? I know he’s guilty. Go and prove that!
Let’s go <color="#FDBE11">teach them youngsters</color> how to fight, shall we? We won’t harm them, it’s gonna be honest.
You win! The kid shall be all right - he’s just pretending to be hurt.
Some greenhorns kicked your ass?! You’d be more confident next time - you don’t want such a shame again.
The Legion has <color="#FDBE11">many fighters</color> who have <color="#FDBE11">joined during our campaign</color> against the Shadow Energy.
Guys like fight with <color="#FDBE11">kicks only</color>. Dunno where they come from, but let’s teach them a lesson in their language.
That’s the way! Let them forget all that was before their joining the Legion. This is an army, not a circus.
No, you're not giving up. Or the whole Legion shall be kicking a dead horse soon - not something we want here.
Many Legionaries fell fighting at Falcon’s Gorge. Their bodies were still warm when the Dynasts came for them.
We must <color="#FDBE11">drive the marauders away</color> and bury our fellow soldiers with their weapons.
The Dynasty's true face, again! It is disgusting to soil my sword with those bastards' blood.
We must not fall back! Fighting for the dead can be more important than defending the living.
After a hard day’s work, you’re having a <color="#FDBE11">night shift at patrolling</color>! It’s going to be difficult, but you must endure!
Your shift is over! Remember, Shadow soldiers will always be treated much stricter than anyone else.
If you let an enemy through while on guard, there’ll be no forgiving. Stand up and fight!
A <color="#FDBE11">game my sis and I played</color> as kids, drawing charcoal numbers on our bodies, then hitting them to <color="#FDBE11">score points</color>.
So, it's my turn to lose at Hit'n'Count this time. Never happened before!
I’m the champion! Playing this game has taught Greta to keep her helmet on all the time she's awake! Hee-hee!
At times, using <color="#FDBE11">Shadow Energy</color>, you’ll be feeling as if you’re plunging into pitch darkness.
Today I’ll <color="#FDBE11">imitate such blackouts</color> by putting out the torches, so that you could be prepared to everything.
You have won in spite of the blackouts. That's what it means to merge with the dark!
Under conditions like these, there's no shame in being defeated. Nobody saw you lose, anyway!
These are our allies, but as long as Legion men are nearby, we have to <color="#FDBE11">pretend we're catching</color> them. Just hold for a while and try not to get a beating.
Good. The Legionaries have left, and now I'll just have to explain to our friends why were we fighting them.
On your feet, fighter. Or has our little show resulted in serious injuries?
There is a Legionary from <color="#FDBE11">Greta's squad</color> asking to join us. I’m sure she is trying to plant a spy here.
Well done! We aren’t going to see this or any other spy any more.
So, he’s more than a match for you!
Many underestimate our Squad. Some idiots used our tent for feasting yesterday.
<color="#FDBE11">Drive those drunkards away</color> before they sober up and grip their swords.
Clean work! None of them will admit last night's deeds!
You know, I have my doubts about you at times. Is defeating a sleepy, unarmed soldier that difficult? Really?
A couple of halfwits from our Squad decided to <color="#FDBE11">experiment with Shadow Energy</color> off-camp. Make them listen to reason.
Thanks. Being taught Shadow tricks is risky itself. It’s still too early for you kids to try new things by yourselves.
They expected to gain cool Shadow techniques, but all they had was blackouts as a side effect. Stop them!

People of the province we’re occupying often flee to the Dynasty’s Capital to tell them what kind of barbarians we are. We need to <color="#FDBE11">intercept</color> one such <color="#FDBE11">runaway</color>.
You’ve helped to bring him back. I’ll see that he’s healed up and then we’ll ask why he tried to flee and give him whatever he lacked living here.
We can’t let him escape. Others will follow his suite. And trust me, there’s nothing good for them in the Capital.
Several Legionaries, slightly drunk, set off to the Dynasty's Capital. We must <color="#FDBE11">intercept them</color>.
Legionaries are allowed to visit the Dynasty lands, but this permission shouldn’t be abused.
They fought you off and you just let them go? We don’t want Dynasty people seeing Legionaries drunk!
Soon enough I’ll teach you all things I've taught your Sarge before. For now, defeat me using <color="#FDBE11">kicks only</color>.
You’re quick indeed. But not prepared to fight like a Dynasty warrior yet. Well, there is a time for things.
While a Legionary lifts up his fist, a Dynasty warrior can kick him trice. Who’s stronger?
I can teach you how to <color="#FDBE11">use your fists</color> to make blows which no Dynast can dodge.
Enough! Do you see now that knuckle fighting is the noblest of all marital arts?
You have failed. These being just the basics... Were they really teaching you anything in the Shadow Squad?!
Not all want to serve in your Shadow squads. We have – better to say, you have – a <color="#FDBE11">deserter</color>. He went off to the Gorge. Bring him back.
Good work, soldier. The bug-out will now have to peel potatoes for the whole squad.
No excuses expected. Are you hurt? Fine, I’m the last person to care.
The partisans have sent their herbalists to the Bamboo Fort to <color="#FDBE11">poison the area</color> with some potions.
My people can’t make a step there. Maybe you have someone in you Squad who has better endurance?
I've always said that Shadow Energy is a poison. Today we've simply used one poison to cure another.
None of your Shadow tricks were of any use. I should have asked somebody else for help.
My people at the Gorge <color="#FDBE11">need help</color>. I could use someone from you Squad.
Ah that’s what it was. Encountering an enemy who regenerates and crying out loud for help.
You’ve failed, too? Can’t say I’m surprised. You are seeing so many shadows that now you’re afraid of your own one.
The adepts of an ancient cult of a an <color="#FDBE11">otherwordly god</color> can still be encountered at the <color="#FDBE11">Gorge</color>.
There is their god’s head carved from a rock a while ago, and some fanatics still gather there to worship it.
You have defeated them in spite of all the anomalies and tricks. Maybe that will help us to suppress the cult.
Oh, I forgot to warn you - when they fight, they sort of drain your strength. Got no idea how do they do that.
<color="#FDBE11">We’re in Dynasty land</color> now, and many here dislike our presence.
The <color="#FDBE11">locals help us with foodstuffs</color> and other needs, but some would rebel occasionally.
So far we have to resort to force in cases like this, but I am sure soon enough that will not be of necessity.
This defeat was rather inopportune. Now they’ll be thinking that rebelling is easier than it seems.
The Dynasts are ambushing our supply trains. We must <color="#FDBE11">stop the bandits</color> as soon as possible.
Thank you, soldier. Our supplies are safe now!
You have your orders! No soldier of mine is going to sleep hungry tonight.
FELLOW SUFFERER
June is trying to talk to Greta
I’m here for a <color="#FDBE11">personal talk</color>, Greta. You can help me getting back at Otto and having his Shadow Squads disbanded.
The Legion’s given free rein to Otto and <color="#FDBE11">put me under his command</color>. One of the guards will send you off.
I shall be coming here <color="#FDBE11">again and again</color> until you listen to me. You can reclaim all you have lost.
What do you know about what I've lost, snotnose? Even my brother outranks me now... Begone!
Shadow Energy entered the world after the Shadow Gates fell. Some see it as a threat to humanity, others as salvation.
Heralds were the reason why the previously invincible Legion was defeated in its first major clash with the Dynasty.
Having confronted the Dynasty, the Legion's elders have taken a decision to permit using the Shadow Energy.
The Legion's resort to Shadow Energy is limited to military use by the special Shadow Squad.
Having lost at Falcon’s Gorge, the Legion consolidated its occupation of one of the Dynasty's border provinces.
Relations between the Legion and the Dynasty are a "cold war." In spite of a truce, the two groups hate each other.
Some in the Dynasty's Chamber want to defeat the Legion in a military operation, others prefer a peaceful solution.
By far the largest city of the known world, Wide Gate City is the prosperous capital of the Dynasty.
The Legion is an army of a northern country which sees delivering the world from Shadow Energy as its sacred duty.
Сlever and agile users of all things old and new, the Dynasty have built their civilization upon pragmatic approach.
The Dynasty believes that whatever helps to achieve the aim is good, and values diversity.
Some in the Legion believe the Heralds and their skills to be a fable born in their cowardly brethren’s imagination.
The Legion accepts everyone who can pass an exhausting test of strength, endurance and fighting abilities.
The Legion came from the north after a scout discovered a concentration of Shadow Energy in the Dynasty’s lands.
The Dynasty fighters rely on dexterity to avoid enemy attacks and to deliver "stinging" hits in ingenious combinations.
Though seemingly ponderous, ironclad Legionaries are very effective fighters who can deal powerful stunning blows.
The Shadow Squad – the Legion’s special Shadow Energy-using unit – consists of non-Legion-born recruits.
Images of a mysterious god from the Shadow World can still be seen at Falcon's Gorge.

TO USE <color="#FDBE11">HELMET'S SHADOW ABILITY</color> PRESS <quad atlas=NativeUI/Atlases/Fight name=stick_btn size=100/> <color="#FDBE11">+</color> <quad atlas=NativeUI/Atlases/Fight name=shadow size=100 color=#FDBE11 /> DURING SHADOW FORM.

TO USE <color="#FDBE11">WEAPON'S SHADOW ABILITY</color> PRESS <quad atlas=NativeUI/Atlases/Fight name=stick_btn size=100 angle=-90/> <color="#FDBE11">+</color> <quad atlas=NativeUI/Atlases/Fight name=shadow size=100 color=#FDBE11 /> DURING SHADOW FORM.

TO USE <color="#FDBE11">ARMOR'S SHADOW ABILITY</color> PRESS <quad atlas=NativeUI/Atlases/Fight name=stick_btn size=100 angle=-180/> <color="#FDBE11">+</color> <quad atlas=NativeUI/Atlases/Fight name=shadow size=100 color=#FDBE11 /> DURING SHADOW FORM.
YOU CAN USE <color="#FDBE11">SHADOW ABILITY</color> AGAIN AFTER A SHORT <color="#FDBE11">COOLDOWN</color>.
[Fight in the dark]
[Hot ground]
[Inverted controls]
[Score victory]
[Opponent is in Shadow Form]
[Opponent regenerates]
[Health drops over time]
[Win on timeout]
[Fists only]
[Kicks only]
[Unarmed fight]
[Replenish health with hits]
[Win without taking any unblocked hits]
[Opponent is invisible]
